notes: This manifest covers publication-readiness checks for public repo candidates.
Open-source QA is artifact-driven; there is no dedicated web surface.

suites.label: Open-source publication prerequisite docs are present
suites.command: python3 -c "from pathlib import Path; import sys; required=['LICENSE','CONTRIBUTING.md','CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md','SECURITY.md','PUBLIC_REPO_PREP.md']; missing=[p for p in required if not Path(p).is_file()]; [print('MISSING:',p) for p in missing]; print('PASS: all publication prerequisite docs present') if not missing else None; sys.exit(1 if missing else 0)"

suites.label: First candidate source scan for private-path and credential patterns
suites.command: python3 -c "from pathlib import Path; import sys; root=Path('/home/ubuntu/forseti.life/sites/forseti/web/modules/custom/ai_conversation'); pats=('/sessions/','/home/ubuntu/forseti.life','thetruthperspective.logging','AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID','AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY'); hits=[]; [hits.append(f'{path}:{idx}:{line.strip()}') for path in root.rglob('*') if path.is_file() for idx,line in enumerate(path.read_text(encoding='utf-8', errors='ignore').splitlines(), start=1) if any(p in line for p in pats)]; [print('HIT:',h) for h in hits]; print('PASS: no blocked private-path or credential patterns found in ai_conversation') if not hits else None; sys.exit(1 if hits else 0)"
